top_signals.title: Oman Fertilizer Firm Defies War Worries and Surges 23% on Debut
top_signals.summary: Oman India Fertiliser Co. jumped more than 23% on its Muscat trading debut after raising 261 million Omani rials ($678 million) in the region’s largest initial public offering of the year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Lyn Alden says Bitcoin needs no savior as Strategy sells $216M of BTC
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin-focused macroeconomist Lyn Alden said BTC must stand on its own as Strategy sold 3,588 BTC, while warning about leverage risks tied to STRC.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Germany set to become first international site for ATACMS missile production
top_signals.summary: The move addresses a bottleneck, as Lockheed Martin has been winding down ATACMS output at its Camden, Arkansas, site while prioritizing newer missiles.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The great AI data centre cover-up
top_signals.summary: Tech companies need to come clean about the mounting environmental fallout of their race to build more hubs
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SONAR Upgrades Batch Rate Intelligence Into a Full RFP Pricing Engine
top_signals.summary:
SONAR this week released a significant upgrade to Batch Rate Intelligence, expanding the feature from a bulk lane analysis tool into what the company describes as a complete RFP pricing workflow.

The post SONAR Upgrades Batch Rate Intelligence Into a Full RFP Pricing Engine appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
